name: plan-stage-backstop
title: Plan-stage deterministic backstop
description: Plan stage lacks the deterministic backstop that objective (objective.py:184-185) and CC (cc.py:230-233) have. When the LLM ends the plan turn with prose (zero-tool abandon shape 6) instead of calling request_plan_confirmation, _post_react_route (plan_subgraph.py:137-152) falls through to narrate and dead-ends -- the chemist sees a spurious clarification (e.g. asking for reaction SMILES, which is NOT needed at plan stage; SMILES is confirmed upstream at the objective stage). The plan is a FIXED 4-step workflow (TLC/CC/FP/RE), so promotion is fully deterministic. SUBTLETY: unlike objective (draft accumulates in state), plan reads plan_draft_pending which AfterToolMiddleware populates ONLY when the tool fires -- so the backstop must SYNTHESIZE the fixed 4-step draft when promoting, else _emit_form_node raises ValueError at plan_subgraph.py:285. Product code only; separate from the test + SSE work. Caught by the new honest-chain-guard spec (06-30-fe-honest-guard).
creator: Drake
